prompt:
A completed pan-tilt rig shows an ultrasonic sensor mounted on top of two stacked servos, all wired cleanly back to a microcontroller board. Jumper wires are bundled for strain relief and a laptop nearby displays a simple radial sweep preview with no readable text. The servos have clearance to rotate without snagging cables.

Place the rig in a tidy solarpunk robotics lab, 512×512 photorealistic, with soft light and no logos, keeping focus on the assembled pan-tilt ultrasonic unit and its neat wiring.
